name: DirectPlayForce
description: Forces direct play for configured clients, blocking all server-side transcoding.
overview: Solves EAC3 / Dolby Digital Plus stuttering and other audio codec playback issues on NVIDIA Shield / Android TV by forcing Jellyfin to deliver media files as-is via direct play — no FFmpeg, no re-encoding, zero quality loss on video or audio.

versions.changelog: Complete rewrite: direct play enforcement only. All transcoding logic removed.
